name: Super Zombie Shooter
description: Super Zombie Shooter features non stop zombie shooting using big arsenal of weapons unlocked on level progress, your mission is to survive the zombie swarm and find the exit on each level.
instructions: WASD - Move LMB - Shoot RMB - Aim Flashlight Space - Jump R - Reload G - Grenade F - Use C - Crouch
tags: 1 Player, 3D, 3D Games, Action, First Person Shooter, Gun, Shoot, Shoot 'Em Up, Shooter, Shooting, Unity3D, WebGL, Zombie
